problem: What synthetic material perfectly mimics bone's mechanical and biological properties?
mechanism: Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure)
hypothesis: Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure) may resolve What synthetic material perfectly mimics bone's mechanical and biological properties? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
